info.title: Owostack API
info.description: Unified billing, entitlements, and usage metering API. Owostack sits between your app and payment providers (Paystack, Stripe, Dodo, Polar) to handle subscriptions, feature gating, metered usage, credit systems, and invoicing.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Sync features and plans from code

tags.name: Credit Systems
tags.description: List credit systems and credit packs

get.summary: Redirect to a fresh checkout session
get.description: Public activation URL for a pending subscription. Generates a fresh provider checkout session and redirects the customer to it.

post.summary: Generate checkout for a pending subscription
post.description: Generates a payment checkout URL for an existing pending subscription. Useful for collecting payment details before activating.

post.summary: Subscribe a customer to a plan
post.description: Creates or switches a subscription for a customer. Handles free plans, upgrades, downgrades, and trial flows. Returns a checkout URL if payment is required.
Check whether a customer is allowed to use a feature and get current usage and limits. Optionally track usage atomically if allowed via sendEvent.
Track usage for a feature and return the resulting entitlement state after the increment.

409.description: Tracked request conflicts with current customer resolution

post.description: Creates a checkout session to purchase a credit pack add-on for a customer.

get.description: Returns the current unbilled usage totals for a customer before invoicing.

post.description: Creates an invoice from the customer's current unbilled usage.

get.description: Lists invoices for a customer in the authenticated organization.

post.description: Attempts to auto-charge an open invoice, or falls back to a checkout session when supported by the provider.

200.description: Invoice paid or checkout created successfully

post.description: Reconciles features, credit systems, credit packs, and plans from an SDK-defined catalog into the database.

get.description: Returns the authenticated customer's saved payment methods and whether a default valid card is available.

post.description: Creates a hosted setup flow to capture or authorize a payment method for future charges.
Deletes a saved payment method for a customer in the authenticated organization.

get.description: Lists plans for the authenticated organization, with optional filtering by group, interval, currency, and active status.
Retrieves a single plan by slug, including its public feature pricing and entitlement configuration.

post.description: Creates a customer if needed, or resolves and updates an existing customer by ID or email.

get.description: Retrieves a customer by ID for the authenticated organization.

post.description: Adds or restores a billable entity such as a seat or licensed member for a feature.

get.description: Lists active and pending-removal entities for a customer, optionally filtered by feature.

post.description: Marks an entity for removal at period end. Pending removals still count toward billing until then.

get.description: Lists credit systems and their feature-to-credit-cost mappings for the authenticated organization.
Lists active credit packs available to the authenticated organization.

post.description: Provider webhook endpoint for Paystack. The organization can be addressed by ID or slug.
Provider webhook endpoint for any supported payment adapter. The organization can be addressed by ID or slug.
